mapper.select: SELECT symbol, trade_date AS tradeDate, open_price AS openPrice, high_price AS highPrice, low_price AS lowPrice, close_price AS closePrice, volume, source, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM stock_candle_daily WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_candle_daily_source ( symbol, trade_date, source, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume ) VALUES
( #{item.symbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{item.source}, ''), 'UNKNOWN'), #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), close_price = VALUES(close_price), volume = VALUES(volume), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_candle_daily ( symbol, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, source ) VALUES
( #{item.symbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{item.source}, ''), 'UNKNOWN') )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open_price = CASE WHEN CASE UPPER(COALESCE(VALUES(source), '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END >= CASE UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END THEN VALUES(open_price) ELSE open_price END, high_price = CASE WHEN CASE UPPER(COALESCE(VALUES(source), '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END >= CASE UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END THEN VALUES(high_price) ELSE high_price END, low_price = CASE WHEN CASE UPPER(COALESCE(VALUES(source), '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END >= CASE UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END THEN VALUES(low_price) ELSE low_price END, close_price = CASE WHEN CASE UPPER(COALESCE(VALUES(source), '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END >= CASE UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END THEN VALUES(close_price) ELSE close_price END, volume = CASE WHEN CASE UPPER(COALESCE(VALUES(source), '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END >= CASE UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END THEN VALUES(volume) ELSE volume END, source = CASE WHEN CASE UPPER(COALESCE(VALUES(source), '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END >= CASE UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) WHEN 'YAHOO-CHART' THEN 100 WHEN 'STOOQ' THEN 80 WHEN 'TOSS' THEN 60 WHEN 'FINNHUB' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END THEN VALUES(source) ELSE source END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
